vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_05.mp3.transcript: It's the bullet you don't hear that gets you!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_07.mp3.transcript: And that's how you win a game!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_09.mp3.transcript: And that is how you do that.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_6s_01.mp3.transcript: Who said Snipers don't belong in 6s?

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_6s_02.mp3.transcript: Put any six blokes together, you'll get a job done. Got a Sniper? You get it done right.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_comp_01.mp.transcript: You've got a Sniper, 'course you're gonna bloody win!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_comp_02.mp.transcript: That is how you win a game!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_comp_03.mp.transcript: That is how a Sniper wins a game!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_comp_04.mp.transcript: 'Course we won; you've got a Sniper on your team!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_gamewon_comp_05.mp.transcript: Ha ha ha! Told you bringing a Sniper was a good idea!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_matchwon_02.mp3.transcript: I knew we'd take care of that!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_matchwon_04.mp3.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha hah!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_matchwon_07.mp3.transcript: Ha ha! We showed them, didn't we?

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_matchwon_08.mp3.transcript: Job done! Let's hit the bar!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_matchwon_10.mp3.transcript: Ha ha! I knew we'd win!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_matchwon_12.mp3.transcript: Good on us, mates! We won!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_01.mp.transcript: I don't make the first move, just the last one.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_14.mp.transcript: Let's show these no-hopers how a Sniper wins a game!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_15.mp.transcript: Let's win this bloody match, boys!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_16.mp.transcript: Who wants to win this bloody game?

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_6s_02.transcript: 6s, eh?. Won't need more than six bullets then.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_6s_04.transcript: 6s with a Sniper, eh? I guess you blokes wanna win.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_6s_05.transcript: You know what this team could use? Five more Snipers.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_comp_.transcript: Good news, lads! I watched their scrim. They all got big, bloody heads!
'Bout time we got a Sniper around here.
'Bout time a Sniper showed up around here.
Tell the other team to watch their heads.
This team just got a lot more accurate.
Good news, lads! I watched their scrim. They're all a bunch of no-hopers!
So the goal is to kill the other team, right? I think I'll muddle through.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamefirst_rare_.transcript: I've got hand-load precision rounds effective to a thousand yards. Let's get this done!
I love this job. Sunshine's free, bullets are cheap, and everybody's got a head.
Never complain, never explain, aim for the brain.
Sniper's not hard, mate. You just need a good eye, a steady hand, and perfect bloody aim.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamelostlast_01.transcript: They ain't won the match yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamelostlast_02.transcript: Come on, lads! They ain't won the match yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamelostlast_05.transcript: Come on, lads! It ain't over yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamelostlast_06.transcript: Let's get in the game, lads!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamelostlast_ra.transcript: Just need to adjust the crosshairs. Now we're in business.
Whip it out and bottle it up, boys! We got a game to win!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregametie_04.mp3.transcript: One apiece. Let's get this done!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregametie_05.mp3.transcript: Looks like we're tied, lads! Let's get ahead!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregametie_06.mp3.transcript: I never cared for ties. How's about we win this one?

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregametie_rare_01.transcript: Sight's steady, trigger's cold. Let's get a lead on this one.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_02..transcript: Settle it out, lads! We ain't won yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_03..transcript: We ain't through this yet! Push 'em back!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_04..transcript: Come on, lads. We ain't through this yet! Push 'em back!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_05..transcript: Keep up the pressure! We ain't won yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_06..transcript: Don't get cocky! We ain't won yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_07..transcript: Looking good! But it ain't bloody over yet!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_08..transcript: Just like the last round, boys! Let's do it again!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_09..transcript: We got this game all sewn up, lads!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_pregamewonlast_rar.transcript: Don't run, mate! You'll just die tired!
Two lines you should never cross, mate: horizontal and vertical.
Shoot straight, shoot first. That's all there is to it.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_01.mp3.transcript: I like three things in this world, mate: coffee, big heads, and ranking up!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_03.mp3.transcript: Good on you, a rank up!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_06.mp3.transcript: Ha ha! Looks like we're ranking up!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_07.mp3.transcript: Good to see the back of that one!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_08.mp3.transcript: I won't lie to you: That was a tough one!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_09.mp3.transcript: Ranked up, did we? Nice work!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_10.mp3.transcript: Hah. There's a nice little promotion!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_13.mp3.transcript: Ha ho ho, beaut! A new rank!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_rankup_highest_01..transcript: Looks like they need to add more ranks!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_summary_callout_05.transcript: That's how a professional gets it done!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_summary_callout_06.transcript: You're better than the best, mate. You're a Sniper.

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_summary_callout_07.transcript: That time, we got some recognition!

vo/compmode/cm_sniper_summary_callout_10.transcript: Hmm hmm hmm. Barely broke a sweat.

vo/sniper_award02.mp3.transcript: That's how we do it in the bush!

vo/sniper_award09.mp3.transcript: I told ya sniping was a good job!

vo/sniper_award12.mp3.transcript: Now that is how it's done!

vo/sniper_award13.mp3.transcript: I could do this all day.

vo/sniper_battlecry01.mp3.transcript: Let's have a go at it.

vo/sniper_cartgoingbackdefensesoft07.mp3.transcript: Nice job! The bomb's moving back.

vo/sniper_cartstoppedoffensesoft01.mp3.transcript: That bloody cart ain't gonna move itself!

vo/sniper_domination01.mp3.transcript: You shouldn't have even gotten outta bed.

vo/sniper_domination02.mp3.transcript: You're gonna keep finding yourself belly up.

vo/sniper_domination03.mp3.transcript: This is getting too easy, mate.

vo/sniper_domination04.mp3.transcript: I'm running outta places to put holes in ya.

vo/sniper_domination05.mp3.transcript: How's about ya call it a day?

vo/sniper_domination06.mp3.transcript: Fightin' men might not be your thing, lad.

vo/sniper_domination07.mp3.transcript: If your strategy is to build me confidence, it's working.

vo/sniper_domination09.mp3.transcript: How many times have you died? I'm actually getting impressed.

vo/sniper_domination10.mp3.transcript: It's only gonna get worse, mate.

vo/sniper_domination11.mp3.transcript: This is as good as you're gonna do.

vo/sniper_domination13.mp3.transcript: You got a forehead on ya like a coffee table.

vo/sniper_domination14.mp3.transcript: Now I gotta make a necklace outta your teeth. Bushman's rules.

vo/sniper_domination15.mp3.transcript: Where'd I get you that time? The liver? The kidney? I'm losing track.

vo/sniper_domination16.mp3.transcript: You're making this so easy, I'm actually getting worse.

vo/sniper_domination17.mp3.transcript: I'm not done yet, mate. Not by a long shot.

vo/sniper_domination23.mp3.transcript: I reckon you're gonna get real used to lookin' up at me.

vo/sniper_domination25.mp3.transcript: That there was a mercy kill. Stay down, lad.

vo/sniper_dominationdemoman03.mp3.transcript: Ace reflexes, ya bomb-chuckin' waste of good scotch!

vo/sniper_dominationdemoman04.mp3.transcript: You've been killed by the best, cyclops!

vo/sniper_dominationengineer03.mp3.transcript: Back to the drawin' board, genius!

vo/sniper_dominationengineer04.mp3.transcript: Not so smart with yer brains outside yer head, are ya?

vo/sniper_dominationengineer05.mp3.transcript: Here's a gadget you should build: one what stops my bullets!

vo/sniper_dominationengineer06.mp3.transcript: You are inventin' loads of new ways to get killed by me!

vo/sniper_dominationheavy02.mp3.transcript: Thanks for the target practice, ya plump bloody freakshow!

vo/sniper_dominationheavy03.mp3.transcript: Dodge that, ya fat jigglin' butterball!

vo/sniper_dominationheavy05.mp3.transcript: Thanks for bein' such a whoppin' big target, mate!

vo/sniper_dominationheavy06.mp3.transcript: I just bagged the world's fattest man!

vo/sniper_dominationmedic01.mp3.transcript: What's up, Doc?! Heh, heh, heh!

vo/sniper_dominationmedic03.mp3.transcript: Quit blubberin' and take yer medicine like a man!

vo/sniper_dominationmedic05.mp3.transcript: Sorry there, nurse, I mistook ya for an actual threat!

vo/sniper_dominationpyro01.mp3.transcript: You are a creepy, mute little bugger, ain't ya?

vo/sniper_dominationpyro02.mp3.transcript: Nobody's gonna miss you, ya mutant!

vo/sniper_dominationpyro04.mp3.transcript: That snuffed yer fire, ya filthy arsonist!

vo/sniper_dominationpyro05.mp3.transcript: Ya know what 'dominated' means, ya bloody whackjob?!

vo/sniper_dominationscout02.mp3.transcript: That'll slow ya down, ya twitchy hooligan!

vo/sniper_dominationscout04.mp3.transcript: Couldn't skip around that, could ya? Ya precious little posey!

vo/sniper_dominationsniper18.mp3.transcript: The bullets come outta the slim end, mate!

vo/sniper_dominationsniper19.mp3.transcript: Nice try, mate, but I'm the best!

vo/sniper_dominationsniper22.mp3.transcript: One Sniper to another, mate: Give! Up!

vo/sniper_dominationsoldier01.mp3.transcript: I own ya, ya pickle-headed drongo!

vo/sniper_dominationsoldier02.mp3.transcript: All rockets, no brains, eh, mate?!

vo/sniper_dominationsoldier04.mp3.transcript: Oi, lend us yer shovel, so I can dig yer grave!

vo/sniper_dominationsoldier06.mp3.transcript: At ease! Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

vo/sniper_dominationspy01.mp3.transcript: Sneak around that, ya phony scoundrel!

vo/sniper_dominationspy04.mp3.transcript: Aww, did I get blood on your suit?

vo/sniper_dominationspy05.mp3.transcript: Cloak yer way outta that, ya filthy spook!

vo/sniper_dominationspy06.mp3.transcript: I! Win! Ya bloody backstabbing fraud!

vo/sniper_dominationspy07.mp3.transcript: I was never on   your  side either! Wanka!

vo/sniper_helpmecapture02.mp3.transcript: Help me capture this bloody thing!

vo/sniper_helpmecapture03.mp3.transcript: Get over here and help me capture!

vo/sniper_helpmedefend02.mp3.transcript: I need a hand defending here!

vo/sniper_helpmedefend03.mp3.transcript: Get over here ya yobbos and help me defend!

vo/sniper_item_birdhead_domination01.mp3.transcript: You and I are a lot alike, mate. Except I'm an owl, and you're dead.

vo/sniper_item_birdhead_kill_scoped01.mp.transcript: I love havin' an owl head!

vo/sniper_item_birdhead_kill_scoped02.mp.transcript: God, I'm good at bein' an owl!

vo/sniper_item_birdhead_kill_scoped03.mp.transcript: Oh, I love this owl head!

vo/sniper_item_birdhead_round_start07.mp.transcript: Hoooot! Am I the only bloody owl?

vo/sniper_item_unicorn_scopekill01.mp3.transcript: Becomin' a unicorn was the best decision I ever made.

vo/sniper_item_unicorn_scopekill04.mp3.transcript: Not bloody bad for a magical pony.

vo/sniper_item_unicorn_scopekill05.mp3.transcript: The secret to pony magic: bullets.

vo/sniper_item_unicorn_scopekill06.mp3.transcript: The unicorn queen can't ignore me now.

vo/sniper_jeers02.mp3.transcript: That's some shonky business right there!

vo/sniper_jeers05.mp3.transcript: Well that was a real BLOODY rootin'!

vo/sniper_jeers07.mp3.transcript: Should've saved a bullet for some of you, blokes!

vo/sniper_meleedare02.mp3.transcript: Let's have a go, ya mug!

vo/sniper_meleedare04.mp3.transcript: I'm gonna carve you a new cake hole!

vo/sniper_meleedare05.mp3.transcript: Let's see how much blood's in ya!

vo/sniper_meleedare09.mp3.transcript: I'm gonna cut a smile into ya!

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_common04.mp3.transcript: Well, Happy Australia Day to me.

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_godlike01.mp3.transcript: It's a miracle. It's an Australian Christmas bloody miracle!

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_godlike02.mp3.transcript: I'm rich. I'm rich! I'm filthy, bloody, stinkin' rich!

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_rare01.mp3.transcript: Whoa, hehehehe! That is bloody beautiful!

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_rare02.mp3.transcript: Now that is not somethin' you see everyday!

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_rare04.mp3.transcript: Now that is the Queen's birthday right there.

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_rare05.mp3.transcript: Come to Sniper, my little beauty.

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_rare06.mp3.transcript: Sniper'll give you a good home, darlin'.

vo/sniper_mvm_loot_rare08.mp3.transcript: Hehehehehehe. You don't see a lot of these!

vo/sniper_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk02.mp3.transcript: The robots are at the bloody gate!

vo/sniper_mvm_resurrect01.mp3.transcript: Ah! What the bloody hell just happened?

vo/sniper_revenge01.mp3.transcript: Not so smug now, are ya?

vo/sniper_revenge02.mp3.transcript: Ya had a good run, ya mongrel.

vo/sniper_revenge03.mp3.transcript: What goes around comes around, ya snotty little nance.

vo/sniper_revenge04.mp3.transcript: Skill always beats luck, ya weasel.

vo/sniper_revenge06.mp3.transcript: Cheatin' only gets ya so far.

vo/sniper_revenge07.mp3.transcript: Look 'ere, pumpkin head: Yer all done.

vo/sniper_revenge08.mp3.transcript: You know what yer dominatin' now? Bleedin'.

vo/sniper_revenge09.mp3.transcript: How's that bullet feel? Feel good? Huh? Huh?

vo/sniper_revenge10.mp3.transcript: Ah, my God, you've been shot. Did you get a look at the handsome rogue who did it?

vo/sniper_revenge13.mp3.transcript: I'm great. You're dead. I think we're done here.

vo/sniper_revenge14.mp3.transcript: You know what you and Jane Austen have in common? You're both dead women.

vo/sniper_revenge15.mp3.transcript: I suspect you'll keep your big mouth shut now.

vo/sniper_revenge17.mp3.transcript: Oooh, got ya right in the ovary.

vo/sniper_revenge19.mp3.transcript: Nothing personal, mate. I'm just better.

vo/sniper_revenge20.mp3.transcript: You want to hear something funny? You're dead.

vo/sniper_revenge21.mp3.transcript: Here's a touchin' story. Once upon a time you died, and I lived happily ever after. The end.

vo/sniper_revenge22.mp3.transcript: Here's some advice: Next time, shoot first.

vo/sniper_revenge23.mp3.transcript: Hate to break it to ya, but your own team paid me to do that.

vo/sniper_revenge24.mp3.transcript: How do you like that, ya snotty little mongrel?

vo/sniper_revenge25.mp3.transcript: There was you, very full of yourself. Then, very briefly surprised. Then, dead.
